remarks: Welcome to one of Orchard Hills' most exceptional residences, a stunning, fully renovated end-unit offering the privacy and feel of a single-family home with the ease of luxury condominium living. Reimagined with over $300,000 in renovations and improvements in 2023 and 2024, this light-filled home showcases impeccable craftsmanship and designer finishes throughout. The elegant open floor plan is perfect for everyday living and entertaining. The chef's kitchen (remodeled in 2015) features custom cabinetry, and beautiful finishes that flow into sophisticated dining and living spaces centered around a charming wood-burning fireplace. Wide-plank hardwood floors, Andersen windows, custom millwork, new doors, lighting, paint, and Hunter Douglas window treatments enhance the home's refined aesthetic. Upstairs are two luxurious bedroom suites, including a spacious primary suite with multiple closets, a walk-in closet, and beautifully appointed bath, plus a newly created second-floor laundry room. The walk-out lower level includes a legal third bedroom, full bath, engineered wood flooring, generous storage, and access to a bluestone patio. Additional improvements include remodeled baths, renovated closets, a wireless security system, new water heater, sump pump motor, HVAC (2022), Hardie Board siding, and GAF Ultra HD roofing. A sparkling community pool and an attached garage further enhance this exceptional offering. Just moments from the heart of New Canaan & Metro-North Train.
